64.reason: [This should initialize to '\0' (null character), not '0' (character zero). Using '0' leaves the string non-null-terminated, causing undefined behavior in subsequent strlen/strcmp.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This should initialize to '\0' (null character), not '0' (character zero). Using '0' leaves the string non-null-terminated, causing undefined behavior in subsequent strlen/strcmp.]
